linhas:.word 119
colunas:.word 175
control:.word 176
matrizsecundaria2:.space 21120

.macro mascaraS
  lb s4,0(s10)
  mul s5,s4,t6
  add s9,s9,s5
.end_macro

.text
  la s3, imagem
  la s7, matrizsecundaria2
  
  li t1,1
  la t0,linhas
  lw t2,0(t0) 
  la t0,colunas
  lw t3,0(t0)
  la t0,control
  lw t4,0(t0) 
    
loop:
  bge t1,t2,fim    
  li t5,1 
loop_colunas:
  bge t5,t3,fim_da_coluna 
 
  #filtro -1 -2 -1  
  #       0   0  0 
  #       1   2  1 
  
  mul s0,t1,t4
  add s0,s0,t5
  add s1,s0,s3 
  
  li t6,-2
  li s9,0
  
  sub s10,s1,t4   
  mascaraS
  
  li t6,-1
  addi s10,s10,-1
  mascaraS
  
  addi s10,s10,2     
  mascaraS
  
  li t6,2
  add s10,s1,t4
  mascaraS

  li t6,1
  addi s10,s10,-1
  mascaraS
  
  addi s10,s10,2     
  mascaraS 
  
  li s8,256
  blt s9,zero normalizar
  bge s9,s8,normalizarp
  j printsalva
normalizar:
  add s9,zero,zero
  j printsalva2
normalizarp:
  addi s9,zero,255
  
printsalva:  
printsalva2:

  add s11, s7, s0

  addi a0,s9,0
  addi a7,zero,1
  ecall
  
  addi a0, zero, 44
  addi a7, zero, 11
  ecall
  
  sb s9, 0(s11)    
 
  addi t5,t5,1
  j loop_colunas
fim_da_coluna:
  addi t1,t1,1
  j loop
 
fim:
  addi a7, zero,10 
  addi a0, s10, 0
  ecall
